Otherwise, no data is displayed. // //////////////////////------ DATA PREVIEW ------/////////////////////////////// // - Choose F8 in ADT to open the data preview and check out the data displayed // - For comparing and checking the output, you can also open the data preview // for the database table. In ADT, press and hold CTRL and click the database // table name.
